beginning_beginning: Supplies ran out two days ago
The men started eating our horses
stamped_just_table_beginning: More and more orders and requests from the men
I cant stand these decisions anymore
But supplies from Carthage will come any day now.
last_real_stamp_beginning: More and more orders and decisions
last_real_stamp_completed: We have been weeks in these mountains
block_tree_completed: Theres no force capable of stoping my revenge upon Rome itself
eagle_beginning: The enemy taunts as on the way.
They will tremble when reinforcements arrive.
